BISCUIT
THE LITTLE
ELLOW PUPPY
Where Is Love,
Biscuit?
A Pet & Play Book
by Alyssa Satin Capucilli

"Where is love, Biscuit?"
Woof! Woof!
"Love is in the soft blanket
Daisy shares with her kittens."

A
"Where is love, Biscuit?"
Woof! Woof!
"Love is in the crunchy cookies
we bake with Dad."

"Where is love, Biscuit?"
Woof! Woof!
"Love is in the woolly sweaters
Grandma knits especially for us."

"Where is love, Biscuit?"
Woof! Woof!
"Love is in the story
we
share with the baby
at bedtime."

"Where is love, Biscuit?"
Woof! Woof!
"Love is in the hugs and kisses
you give me every day!
Sweet puppy!"
Woof!

Ages 2-6
Where is love, Biscuit? Discover all the wonderful places where love
can be found in this delightful touch-and-feel adventure!
